creator: gja822@narod.ru
text:
Using graphics/jpeg (not jpeg-turbo). Some ports expect libjpeg.pc which graphics/jpeg do not put.
For example, print/cups-filters building give the error:

onfigure: error: Package requirements (libqpdf >= 3.0.2) were not met:

Package 'libjpeg', required by 'libqpdf', not found

but it's just solved by putting simple libjpeg.pc into /usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig
